title: V696
description:
*NEW REWORK*

Fifteen years ago, the Еһeytan family vanished. Tonight, you return to the village they left behind вҖ” and something is still waiting in the houses. A first-person psychological horror built on atmosphere, silence, and the feeling that you are never truly alone.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Fifteen years ago, the Еһeytan family left their village. 

No one ever heard from them again.

Tonight, you return.

V696 is a first-person psychological horror game set in an 

abandoned Anatolian village, where every house holds a fragment 

of a story the villagers tried to forget. There are no weapons. 

There is no combat. There is only you, the signs left behind, 

and the growing certainty that something in this place remembers 

the family вҖ” and now remembers you.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

WHAT YOU WILL DO

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

- Explore a fully reworked village with multiple houses, 

 each hiding a piece of the family's fate

- Follow the signs, read what was left behind, and piece 

 together what truly happened fifteen years ago

- Trust your instincts вҖ” what you see is only part of the 

 meaning. Your mind must assemble the rest

- Experience 8D spatial audio designed to make you turn 

 around, even when you know nothing is there

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

ATMOSPHERE OVER JUMPSCARES

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

V696 draws from the folklore of rural Anatolia вҖ” a tradition 

where fear lives not in monsters, but in silence, in empty 

rooms, and in the feeling of being watched by something you 

cannot name. This is horror rooted in culture, not clichГ©.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

A WORD OF CAUTION

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

This game deals with themes of the occult, spiritual unease, 

and things better left undisturbed. If these subjects trouble 

you personally, we recommend you play with the lights on вҖ” 

or not at all.

Sudden sounds. Blood. Mature content.

The impression that something is standing just behind you 

may stay with you long after you close the game.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

LANGUAGES

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

English вҖў TГјrkГ§e вҖў Deutsch вҖў Р СғСҒСҒРәРёР№ вҖў EspaГұol (LATAM) вҖў AzЙҷrbaycan
description_short: V696 is a first-person horror-thriller game. It contains a cult subject of veiled beings. Even if everything seems clear at first glance, it has a gripping story that will throw you a curve.
